attacks.text: If <50 mapped genes per module GSEA is unreliable; print mapped-gene count and skip if too few.
shared universe must be genes present in BOTH assignments; report background size.
low nPerm Z unstable; report nPerm and label indicative.

qc_checkpoints.name: mapped_counts
qc_checkpoints.text: print mapped Entrez count per module before ORA/GSEA

qc_checkpoints.name: gsea_stats
qc_checkpoints.text: report FDR + NES, not just p

failure_stop_rules.name: no_enrichment
failure_stop_rules.text: if neither convergent module shows FDR<0.05 enrichment, the 'pathway identity' claim is WEAK -> say so
